name: Hyori's Bed and Breakfast
overview: The famous diva, Lee Hyo-ri, has been taking a long hiatus from the spotlight and enjoying her life in the suburbs of Jeju Island with her husband. The couple has decided to open up their home as a Bed and Breakfast to various people to offer them a time of healing and rest from their busy lives.

trailers.title: [티저 2] 효리네 민박 New 직원 윤아♥ 추위 녹이는 인형 미소
